generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor signals for power and torque"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSignalDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle and direction signals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringSignalDataTransmitted
]

instance ServoSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing servo control signals for actuation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ServoSignalDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSignalSensor
]

instance SteeringSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringSignalSensor
]

instance ServoSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ServoSignalSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Raw vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance MotorSignalData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Raw motor signal data for power and torque"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance SteeringSignalData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Raw steering signal data for angle and direction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance ServoSignalData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Raw servo control signal data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ServoSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component for clustering and tracking LiDAR point clouds in Data Pre-Processing FE"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data translation component implementing ISO 23247 standard for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2CommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based communication system for internal software component interaction"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected paths, object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation command generation) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, CalculatedSpeedInsight, GenerateActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Service enabling operators to control ACC, set speeds, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to save collected data for future analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to generate detailed reports from monitored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Insight identifying lead vehicle presence and distance"
]

instance CalculatedSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Insight calculating optimal speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance GenerateActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to generate vehicle control commands for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to set target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Provides [
    base:desc "Action to trigger emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical hardware entity hosting sensor and actuator components"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorSignalSensor, SteeringSignalSensor, ServoSignalSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital entity managing data processing and control mechanisms"
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing entity with 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
    base:contains VisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Control panel for operator interaction and system management"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor actuation and steering servo actuation are generated by the ACC Controlling FE, processed by the Data Translation FE for serialization and unit conversion, and transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to the Actuation FE. The document does not specify details on command validation, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, or execution confirmation mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to meet safety-critical vehicular application standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific temporal granularity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with deviations in the Physical Twin Entity's scope, which hosts general automotive functionality unlike the standard's OME. Components are organized into ROS2 packages per FE, deployed across separate hardware for each entity, with system-wide coordination managed through ROS2 communication and 100 ms clock synchronization for device coordination."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2021 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Part 4 of the standard addresses information exchange protocols, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as a potential implementation framework for Functional Entities within the architecture."
]
